leadText: Aqua Jet (Japanese: アクアジェット Aqua Jet) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Aqua Jet inflicts damage. It has a priority of +1, so is used before all moves that do not have increased priority. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Aqua Jet raises the user's action speed. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 20 Agile Strong Power 40 30 50 Accuracy 100% 100% 100% Action speed modifier Self -4 -4 +2 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect ? ? ? ? ? ? Raises the user's action speed Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Like all other moves that previously possessed priority, Aqua Jet causes the user to dash forward to make damaging contact with the target (although terrain may interfere with doing so). During the dash, the user is intangible and will not make contact with projectiles and hazards that they pass through. Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 30 36 Cooldown 3s Move wind-up time 0 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user lunges at the foe at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first. B W B2 W2 The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. This move always goes first. LA The user lunges at the target to deal damage, moving at a speed that makes it almost invisible. This also raises the user's action speed. S V The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first. ZA The user attacks by lunging toward targets with blinding speed.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on a target up to 2 tiles away. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる ２マスまで とどく MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy. It reaches up to 2 tiles away.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Since its introduction in Generation IV , Aqua Jet has had the same description text as Quick Attack .
